data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies choices to reduce decision time for user engagement.

data.title: Fitt’s Law
data.description: Optimizes layout by placing frequent actions within easy reach.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design, thumb-friendly navigation for mobile devices.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: Leveraging aesthetics to enhance perceived usability and user satisfaction.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related elements to improve interface structure and readability.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Designs memorable peak moments to enhance user experience.
